rulings.Case Title: WAYNE HARTMAN VS. AIR & LIQUID SYSTEMS CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Substituting Sherry Newton As Successor-In-Interest To, And Substituting Successor-In-Interest For, Deceased Plaintiff; And For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday May 19, 2026, in Department 502, Line 1. Petitioner's Motion Substituting Sherry Newton, as Decedent's successor-in-interest, for Wayne Hartman, Deceased, and to file a First Amended Complaint is GRANTED. No opposition filed. The Court has executed Plaintiff's proposed order.
